By Date Version Notes: Christopher Veau 10 / 04 /202 2 0.0 Original document. Christopher Veau 11/16/2022 0.1 Adding business verbiage in section 3.3 EX 56 – Slotting Move Min/Max Conversion McLane is facing an issue where when a slot move is made base WM updates the Pick Location Detail Minimum and Maximum units based off Units UOM, and since the UOM that McLane uses throughout their facility is Packs the value is calculated is incorrect. Additionally, McLane is wanting to introduce logic wh ere a minimum number of packs can be set and if the WM logic for minimum number of units is under this minimum, then, the configured minimum number of packs is used. Furthermore, similar logic is used to update the Release Held Replenishment minimum units. Summary Information Customer Name: McLane Customer Code: MCLN Subproject Codes: TBD Change Request Number: Overview Functional Area Enhanced Additional Information User Interface (UI) N MHE N RF N Reporting N Other Y Slotting logic for setting Min/ MAx The base slotting logic that WM currently walks through can be found in SlotInfo Interfaces FS . Essentially when doing a slot move WM will update the pick location detail max inventory quantity, minimum inventory quantity, and the minimum quantity to release held replenishments. The calculations used for these are based on UOM of units. This modification adds conversion to UOM of Packs for these three calculated metrics. Assumptions Logic applies only f or the Pick Determination Zone s with Parameter 4-4 set to U nits in System Code B-331 Logic found in modifications only pertains to Slotting moves for INT40 , INT41 , INT9 and INT 1 No other slotting changes are in scope for this modification No changes to how INT40, INT41, INT9 and INT1 transactions are carried out All items have a configured Package UOM record for Packs The minimum number of packs to be set in system code B-330 param 57-59 is set by McLane There will never be a need of having a minimum number of packs > 999 ITEM_FACILITY_MAPPING_WMS.DFLT_MIN_FROM_PREV_LOCN_FLAG <> 1 Dependencies Code Dependencies Interface Dependencies N/A P latform Information Solution: Solution Platform: Solution Version: Warehouse Management Open Systems Oracle/ Tomcat /RHEL 201 9 Slotting Location Logic changes Enablement IF C-00 0 -000 byte 1 = Y (global extension enablement) IF C-000-EX 56 byte 1 = Y (EX 56 extension enablement) ELSE the EX56 functionality is disabled ELSE the EX56 functionality is disabled ELSE the EX56 functionality disabled Validations Base slotting validation found in the SlotInfo Interface FS are followed. The main validations from base that the modification focuses on is if the Pick Determination Zone Min/Max UOM (B-331 param 4-4) is set to Units and Additionally, when a slot move is made, for the destination location if the Pick Location Assignment Zone associated with move has B-330 Param 56-56 = Y THEN EX56 is enabled , else EX56 is disabled. Updates Once the above validations have passed WM carries out the below updates in order to adjust the MAX units, MIN units, and Minimum units to release replenishments to be a multiple of packs for that item. T he below logic is used to check against the CUST_MIN_CASES (B-330 Parm 57-59) The following logic is put into place by the modification. The MAX is rounded DOWN to the nearest full pack multiple The MIN is rounded UP to the nearest full pack multiple If the MIN or MAX is less than the static number of packs configured ( B-330 Parm 57-59) either value is rounded up to that static value. Below is the background logic used for the changes : WM creates a new PICK_LOCN_DTL record for the Move To Location and SKU For PICK_LOCN_DTL Max Field Set PICK_LOCN_DTL . MAX_INVN_QTY = ( FLOOR (INPT_SLOTINFO_MOVE_LIST.MOVE_QTY/ IPC.Quantity ) )* IPC.Quantity Where the IPC.IS_STD = 1 and IPC. PACKAGE_UOM_ID = 46 (Packs) IF PICK_LOCN_DTL . MAX_INVN_QTY < or = CUST_MIN_ PACKS (B-330 Parm 57 - 59 ) * IPC.Quantity Where the IPC.IS_STD = 1 and IPC.PACKAGE_UOM_ID = 46 (Packs) THEN Set PICK_LOCN_DTL . MAX_INVN_QTY = CUST_MIN_PACKS * IPC.Quantity Where the IPC.IS_STD = 1 and IPC.PACKAGE_UOM_ID = 46 (Packs) ELSE Keep PICK_LOCN_DTL . MAX_INVN_QTY as is For PICK_LOCN_DTL MIN Fields Set PICK_LOCN_DTL.MIN_INVN_QTY = CEIL ((MAX_INVN_QTY * Percent of Max for Min Inv for the Pick Locn Assign Zone (Sys Code B330, Parm 5-6)/ IPC.Quantity )* IPC.Quantity ) Where the IPC.IS_STD = 1 and IPC.PACKAGE_UOM_ID = 46 (Packs) I F PICK_LOCN_DTL.MIN_INVN_QTY < or = CUST_MIN_ PACKS (B - 330 Parm 57 - 59 ) * IPC.Quantity Where the IPC.IS_STD = 1 and IPC.PACKAGE_UOM_ID = 46 (Packs) THEN Set PICK_LOCN_DTL.MIN_INVN_QTY = CUST_MIN_ PACKS * IPC.Quantity Where the IPC.IS_STD = 1 and IPC.PACKAGE_UOM_ID = 46 (Packs) ELSE Keep PICK_LOCN_DTL.MIN_INVN_QTY as is Set PICK_LOCN_DTL.MIN_QTY_TO_RLS_HELD_RPLN = CEIL (( MAX_INVN_UNITS * Percent of Max for Min to Release Repl (Sys Code B330, Parm 7-8) / IPC.Quantity )* IPC.Quantity ) Where the IPC.IS_STD = 1 and IPC.PACKAGE_UOM_ID = 46 (Packs)   NOTE: Due to the nature of the logic the Min, max, and release held replen values should always be positive whole numbers . Additionally, the max should always be greater than or equal to the min. Navigation No changes to base navigation as part of this extension Outputs No changes to outputs as part of this extension. Activity Tracking No changes to base activity tracking as part of this extension. PIX No changes to PIX generation as part of this extension. LM Hooks No changes to base LM Hooks as part of this extension . Process Change/Addition No additional process changes in scope for this extension. Reporting , Label, or Document Not report, label or document changes in scope for this extension. Other Solutions Included in Extension Not in scope for this extension. Performance Expectations The p urpose of this section is to identify performance requirements up front Process Step Peak Transaction Rate Max Response 95% Response Recovery Queue Recovery Time Operations Driver & notes Required Data Setup All necessary data setup for the extension to function accurately are detailed below. Menu Parameters Parameter (Category > Parameter) Value Warehouse Master Parameter (Tab > Section > Parameter ) Value System Codes Code ID Details Parameter Configuration Rec Type Code Type Code ID Short Description Description Frm To Description Validation Type Configured value C 00 0 000 Global Extension Control Global Extension Control 1 1 Enablement Flag Check Box Y/N Flag Y – Global Extension Control is turned ON C 000 EX 56 EX 56 Extension Control EX 56 Extension Control 1 1 Enablement Flag Check Box Y/N FLag Y – EX 56 Extension Control is turned ON B 330 XXX 56 56 EX56 Enablement Check Box Y/N FLag Y – EX 56 Extension Control is turned ON B 330 XXX 57 59 Min Invn in Packs Edit Box Numeric Only 0-999 0 Database Not required for this extension.
